note: Provenance manifest for archived source documents. Both sources/ and this manifest are committed (not under public/, never imported by app code, so Vite never ships them to the deployed site). Regenerate with `npm run archive-sources`. sha256 is the signature for drift detection; first_archived/last_verified track when each was scraped. Every fetch is scanned for common secret patterns (API keys, tokens) before being written to disk -- an entry's "redacted" field lists what was found and stripped, if anything.
